# akinator

provides evented api and a cli app

`npm i -g akinator` to install `akinator` which you can run at any time

```javascript
import Akinator from 'akinator';

const akinator = new Akinator();

akinator.on('answer', () => {
  // do something
});

akinator.on('guess', () => {
  // something else
});

akinator.on('end', (win) => {
  if (win) // akinator guessed correctly
});
```
